title: Old new pack
body:
A texture pack that replaces cubes & items with snapshot-exclusive textures, such as ores, unprocessed minerals, 1.14 snapshot work cubes, candles, binoculars, etc.

一个把方块&物品换成快照独有纹理的纹理包，比如矿石，未加工的矿物，1.14快照的工作方块，蜡烛，望远镜等

21w07a &21w08a的矿石        Ore from 21w07a & 21w08a
![21w07a &21w08a的矿石        Ore from 21w07a & 21w08a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30f9f94b235ea32c9b399528e4f8bad65ddd20e.png)



![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75e608cb7f3cc74c91dc51ac81145983a4a01a5.png)


1.14 Snapshot of the square texture        1.14快照的方块纹理
![ 1.14 Snapshot of the square texture        1.14快照的方块纹理](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c8ce927909e6114bf49c999ca54ff106e8f0b2.png)
